gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言，编织一场跨越生死的温柔邂逅。
gems.whyWatchEn: A poignant romantic comedy where mistaken voicemails to a deceased sister spark an unexpected, long-distance connection.
gems.audience: 喜欢非传统浪漫故事、注重情感深度与意外惊喜的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Audiences who enjoy unconventional romance stories with emotional depth and delightful surprises.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 当经典玩具遇上数字时代，一场关于陪伴与成长的温暖反思。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever and heartfelt look at how classic toys navigate a world dominated by screens and smart gadgets.
gems.audience: 陪伴《玩具总动员》长大的观众，以及关心孩子屏幕时间的家庭。
gems.audienceEn: Fans who grew up with Toy Story and families concerned about screen time and play.

gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 史诗归途，一场比战争更考验人性的冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A visually stunning and emotionally raw retelling of Odysseus's perilous journey home.
gems.audience: 热爱宏大叙事、古典神话与深刻人性探索的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of grand narratives, classical mythology, and deep explorations of human nature.
